name: Speedroid Red-Eyed Dice
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スピードロイド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>赤</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>目</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のダイス
desc: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Speedroid" monster you control, except "Speedroid Red-Eyed Dice", and declare a Level from 1 to 6; it becomes that Level until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Speedroid" monster you control, except "Speedroid Red-Eyed Dice", and declare a Level from 1 to 6; it becomes that Level until the end of this turn.
eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Speedroid" monster you control, except "Speedroid Red-Eyed Dice", and declare a Level from 1 to 6; it becomes that Level until the end of this turn.
